name: cvd-record sets remediation_status=fixed when a finding names a fixed_in version, open otherwise
command: printf '%s' '[{"component":"lodash","severity":"critical","fixed_in":"4.17.21","advisory_id":"GHSA-x","source":"cisa-kev"},{"component":"left-pad","severity":"medium","advisory_id":"GHSA-y","source":"osv"}]' > f.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/cvd-record.sh" --findings f.json 2>e.txt; grep -qE 'GHSA-x .*status=fixed' e.txt && grep -qE 'GHSA-y .*status=open' e.txt && echo c23-status-enum 1>&2
